news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
South Indian Bank's Q4 update shows CASA ratio rose to 32.1%, CASA deposits up 17.5% YoY.
Advances grew 15.7% YoY to ₹1.01 lakh cr; shares rose 6% to ₹36.2, 1-yr return at 53%.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank's Q4 update shows CASA ratio rose to 32.1%, CASA deposits up 17.5% YoY.
Advances grew 15.7% YoY to ₹1.01 lakh cr; shares rose 6% to ₹36.2, 1-yr return at 53%.

news.title:
South Indian Bank, Karur Vysya Bank, and Tamilnad Mercantile Bank saw advances grow faster than deposits in FY26.
Data shows mid and small private banks outpacing deposit growth with credit expansion in FY26.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank, Karur Vysya Bank, and Tamilnad Mercantile Bank saw advances grow faster than deposits in FY26.
Data shows mid and small private banks outpacing deposit growth with credit expansion in FY26.

news.title:
South Indian Bank's gross advances reached ₹1.01T YoY.
Deposits rose to ₹1.23T, showcasing yearly growth.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank's gross advances reached ₹1.01T YoY.
Deposits rose to ₹1.23T, showcasing yearly growth.

news.title:
South Indian Bank's credit rating reaffirmed at IVR AA/Stable by Infomerics.
Fixed Deposit Programme of Rs. 25,000 crore also rated IVR AA/Stable.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank's credit rating reaffirmed at IVR AA/Stable by Infomerics.
Fixed Deposit Programme of Rs. 25,000 crore also rated IVR AA/Stable.

news.title:
South Indian Bank appoints ex-RBI ED Jose Joseph Kattoor as part-time Chairman.
Kattoor, with 30+ years at RBI, will strengthen governance and strategic vision.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank appoints ex-RBI ED Jose Joseph Kattoor as part-time Chairman.
Kattoor, with 30+ years at RBI, will strengthen governance and strategic vision.

news.title:
South Indian Bank's board approved promotions of 7 senior executives effective 1 April 2026.
Key roles include COO, Chief Credit Officer, CIO, and CFO; executives have 16-34 years' experience.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank's board approved promotions of 7 senior executives effective 1 April 2026.
Key roles include COO, Chief Credit Officer, CIO, and CFO; executives have 16-34 years' experience.

news.title:
South Indian Bank revised MCLR rates effective 20th March 2026, with 1-year MCLR at 9.5%.
Updated MCLR for tenors: Overnight 8%, 1-month 8.45%, 3-month 9.4%, 6-month 9.45%.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank revised MCLR rates effective 20th March 2026, with 1-year MCLR at 9.5%.
Updated MCLR for tenors: Overnight 8%, 1-month 8.45%, 3-month 9.4%, 6-month 9.45%.

news.title:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.
news.summary:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.

news.title:
South Indian Bank revises MCLR for multiple tenors effective 20 Feb 2026.
Rates: Overnight 7.95%, 1-month 8.4%, 3-month 9.35%, 6-month 9.4%, 1-year 9.45%.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank revises MCLR for multiple tenors effective 20 Feb 2026.
Rates: Overnight 7.95%, 1-month 8.4%, 3-month 9.35%, 6-month 9.4%, 1-year 9.45%.

news.title:
South Indian Bank gains institutional interest; FIIs raised stakes to 20.9% and DIIs to 13.8% in Q3FY26.
Bank's focus on MSMEs, digital initiatives, and improved asset quality drove 60% stock surge YoY.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank gains institutional interest; FIIs raised stakes to 20.9% and DIIs to 13.8% in Q3FY26.
Bank's focus on MSMEs, digital initiatives, and improved asset quality drove 60% stock surge YoY.

news.title:
South Indian Bank held an analyst/investor meeting on Feb 10, 2026.
The meeting with White Oak Capital was virtual; no UPSI was shared.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank held an analyst/investor meeting on Feb 10, 2026.
The meeting with White Oak Capital was virtual; no UPSI was shared.

news.title:
South Indian Bank held a virtual one-on-one investor meeting with Unifi Capital on Feb 2, 2026.
The bank confirmed no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the meeting.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank held a virtual one-on-one investor meeting with Unifi Capital on Feb 2, 2026.
The bank confirmed no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the meeting.

news.title:
South Indian Bank Ltd sees exceptional volume surge on 1 Feb 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and peers, signaling renewed investor interest.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank Ltd sees exceptional volume surge on 1 Feb 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and peers, signaling renewed investor interest.

news.title:
South Indian Bank's valuation shifted to attractive due to price correction.
Improved metrics position it favorably among peers, offering a good entry point.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank's valuation shifted to attractive due to price correction.
Improved metrics position it favorably among peers, offering a good entry point.

news.title:
South Indian Bank shares fell 14%, marking the largest drop in 8 years.
The decline followed the CEO's decision not to seek reappointment.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank shares fell 14%, marking the largest drop in 8 years.
The decline followed the CEO's decision not to seek reappointment.

news.title:
South Indian Bank Ltd. announces potential nationwide strike on Jan 27, 2026.
Bank's ATMs and digital channels to remain operational despite strike.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank Ltd. announces potential nationwide strike on Jan 27, 2026.
Bank's ATMs and digital channels to remain operational despite strike.

news.title:
South Indian Bank Ltd's valuation shifts from fair to expensive, indicating changing market sentiment.
The bank shows robust returns versus Sensex and peers, highlighting its position in private sector banking.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank Ltd's valuation shifts from fair to expensive, indicating changing market sentiment.
The bank shows robust returns versus Sensex and peers, highlighting its position in private sector banking.

news.title:
South Indian Bank expects NIM pressure in Q4, focusing on loan growth.
It plans to shift from corporate lending to retail, agriculture, and MSME segments.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank expects NIM pressure in Q4, focusing on loan growth.
It plans to shift from corporate lending to retail, agriculture, and MSME segments.

news.title:
South Indian Bank shifts focus to high-yield retail and non-corporate assets, reducing short-term corporate loans to boost margins.
Gold loans grew 26% YoY, supported by RBI guidelines, while NRI deposits grew 9% with expectations of double-digit growth ahead.
news.summary:
South Indian Bank shifts focus to high-yield retail and non-corporate assets, reducing short-term corporate loans to boost margins.
Gold loans grew 26% YoY, supported by RBI guidelines, while NRI deposits grew 9% with expectations of double-digit growth ahead.
